paper_quote: GPT Pro consult §4: tan_full assembly using period-π reduction + Cayley witnesses
informal_pl: Złożenie tan_period_reduction + lokalne świadki Cayley + shiftByPiℂ przez subst0.
informal_en: Composes tan_period_reduction + local Cayley witnesses + shiftByPiℂ via subst0.
lean_target_signature: theorem tan_full (x : ℝ) (hx : Real.cos x ≠ 0) : ∃ t : EMLTermℂ, ∃ vc : ℂ, t.eval? env_x = some vc ∧ vc.im = Real.tan x
notes: SEALED 2026-05-08 by Aristotle. Strategy: lt_trichotomy on y = x-kπ (y < 0 → neg Cayley; y = 0 → .one with tan 0 = 0; y > 0 → pos Cayley). Aristotle made one minor adjustment: changed `opaque EMLTermℂ : Type` to `def EMLTermℂ : Type := PUnit` because Lean 4 opaque needs Inhabited. Proof time: ~17 min. Ready to lift into Periodicity.lean once arctanViaArcsin (078) and sinViaCos (075) also return.
